name: Carrots

pros.title: very strong vitamin A identity
pros.explanation: This is a major category strength and part of what makes carrots a genuinely good vegetable.

pros.title: cheap and practical
pros.explanation: Easy to buy, store, snack on, and cook with.

pros.title: easy raw-snack use
pros.explanation: A practical advantage compared with fussier vegetables.

cons.title: sweetness is a bit higher than the cleanest vegetables
cons.explanation: Still fine, just not ultra-low-sugar by category standards.

cons.title: micronutrient spread is narrower than elite greens
cons.explanation: Great at some things, less absurdly dense overall than the very top vegetables.

cons.title: protein is basically irrelevant
cons.explanation: Not a real flaw, but still nearly absent.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
